name: report_waivers
short_description: Report status of DRC/METHODOLOGY/CDC/LINT message waivers
full_help:
report_waivers

Description: 
Report status of DRC/METHODOLOGY/CDC/LINT message waivers

Syntax: 
report_waivers  [-file <arg>] [-type <arg>] [-write_valid_waivers]
                [-write_ignored_waivers] [-append] [-return_string]
                [-show_msgs_with_no_waivers] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                          Description
  -----------------------------------------
  [-file]                       Name of file to report waivers
  [-type]                       Type of waiver - ALL, DRC, METHODOLOGY, CDC, 
                                LINT
  [-write_valid_waivers]        (special) Specifies writing out the specific 
                                waivers which were used in the last 
                                report_drc/methodology/cdc/lint run(s)
  [-write_ignored_waivers]      (special) Specifies writing out the specific 
                                waivers which were NOT used in the last 
                                report_drc/methodology/cdc/lint run(s)
  [-append]                     Append the current report results to the file
                                specified with -file
  [-return_string]              Return report results as a string object
  [-show_msgs_with_no_waivers]  Also list report_drc/methodology/cdc/lint 
                                messages which have no defined waivers
  [-quiet]                      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                    Suspend message limits during command 
                                execution

Categories: 
Waiver, Report, Object
